text.title: Change Control Worked Example
text.summary: One worked example showing Change Control applied end-to-end on a representative engagement.

example.title: Reference engagement
example.code: Engagement: acme-platform-2026 (baseline v3) CR-0042: Add billing webhook retry logic. Submitted by: PO at 2026-05-20. Impact analysis: cost_delta_pct: +4.5% (3 dev-days) schedule_delta_days: +7 scope_delta: webhook retry queue with DLQ risk_delta: decreases (reduces support load) Tier: tier-2 (cost in 2-10% band). Routed to: U_SPONSOR. Decision: approved 2026-05-22. Rationale: reduces support ticket volume; cost recovered in 30 days. Baseline v3 -> v4 with CR-0042 reference.
example.note: Illustrates every rule from content/01-core-rules.xml on a realistic case.
